text:
China’s financial development model has integrated
                                                                                                                    both sectors into one. As an important form and reflection of govern-
                                                                                                                    ment-led market-oriented financial reform, China Development Bank
                                                                                                                    (CDB) has actively quested for development financial theory and
                                                                                                                    practice with Chinese characteristics. With national development
                                                                                                                    goals as its own mission, CDB has improved the macroeconomic
                                                                                                                    operational status through market-based operations, overcome the
                                                                                                                    obstacles of long-term construction financing to provide strong
